---
name: Backlog Gap / Follow-up
about: Track a missing feature or audit-generated follow-up work.
title: '[GAP] '
labels: backlog-gap
---

## Track ID
Specify the track and ID (e.g., [FE-XXX], [BE-XXX], [DEVOPS-XXX]).

## Context
Describe the identified gap and how it was discovered (e.g., "Audit found missing input validation on surface X").

## Expected Outcome
What does the "done" state look like for this feature or fix?

## Implementation Notes
Technical details, suggested approach, or potential blockers.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Primary functional requirement met
- [ ] Integration with existing surfaces verified
- [ ] Edge cases handled according to audit specs
